differential_diagnoses: Chronic portal vein thrombosis with portal cavernoma
Non-cirrhotic portal hypertension (e.g., idiopathic portal hypertension)
next_steps: Assess for chronic mesenteric ischemia via CT angiography or mesenteric Doppler
Perform diagnostic paracentesis to rule out SBP and evaluate SAAG if ascites is present
Perform hypercoagulability workup (JAK2 mutation, PNH, protein C/S, antithrombin, Factor V Leiden)
Review history for chronic liver injury signs or specific toxic exposures
Evaluate for underlying prothrombotic state due to abdominal trauma history
